aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 最近观点的显著转变是：从早期对光学板块和Meta削减资本开支的恐慌性抛售持批评态度，转变为重新确认供应链短缺和机构回补的长期看多逻辑，并更加集中于人形机器人整机与上游核心零部件。
representative_quotes: Retail thinks a 30-60% drop is a “falling knife” where bagholders will never recover. ... I see it as long term ownership over: - the next hyperscaler with $NBIS, projecting $7-9B ARR Q4 - 40% of the InP supply chain with $AXTI - leader of the next optical shift with $SIVE with CW DFB lasers - leader of US humanoids with $CCXI inside a future trillion dollar theme
Indiscriminate selloffs from things like cascading margin liquidations, usually provide compelling opportunities if the underlying improves.
High confidence, institutions will end up going long on the same names they’re bearposting after retail capitulates.
